creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 149024
Patch for mysql51-server Makefile

Patch to add Mariadb-10.0 to the conflicts list and cleanup of no longer existing ports MySQL < 5.0
More generic matching of MariaDB and Percona ports
There's only one other -scripts port (mariadb) and later versions don't have -scripts slave ports.

For MySQL 5.1 the master -server port includes -client and -scripts
